HOME ABOUT CAREERS
Careers
Overview

Join a passionate and collaborative team dedicated to nurturing bright futures. At Kanata Academy, we pride ourselves on fostering a supportive, engaging, and inclusive working environment where educators and staff can thrive. Our small class sizes and close-knit community allow teachers to form meaningful connections with students, creating a fulfilling and impactful teaching experience.

Submit Your Resume

Even if no current roles match your expertise, we’re always interested in connecting with passionate educators and support staff. Send your resume to info@kanataacademy.com, and we’ll keep it on file for future opportunities.

CONNECT
Let’s Start the Conversation

Have questions about our programs, facilities, or admissions? Reach out today to schedule a tour, learn more about our offerings, or discuss how Kanata Academy can support your family.

CONTACT US TODAY
